name: Au Gratin Potatoes
recipeIngredient: To taste: black pepper and milk (about 1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
3. Cook the potatoes in their skins until tender, about 20-25 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, combine melted butter, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, chopped onion, grated cheddar cheese, and black pepper.
5. Thin the mixture with milk to desired consistency.
6. Once the potatoes are done, cool slightly, then peel and slice into about 1/4-inch-thick pieces.
7. Spread the potato slices in the greased baking pan and pour the soup/sauce mixture over top.
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until the top is browned and the potatoes are bubbly. Leftovers taste even better.
